Hartley tag:www.producthunt.com,2005:Post/1117264 2026-04-06T15:31:55-07:00 2026-04-10T08:04:44-07:00 Voquill on iOS & Android <p> The open source WisprFlow alternative, now on mobile </p> <p> <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/products/voquill?utm_campaign=producthunt-atom-posts-feed&amp;utm_medium=rss-feed&amp;utm_source=producthunt-atom-posts-feed">Discussion</a> | <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/r/p/1117264?app_id=339">Link</a> </p> Josiah Saunders tag:www.producthunt.com,2005:Post/1118756 2026-04-08T04:55:54-07:00 2026-04-10T08:04:43-07:00 Observer <p> Live logs inside your IDE to Debug without context switching </p> <p> <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/products/observer-by-qapilot?utm_campaign=producthunt-atom-posts-feed&amp;utm_medium=rss-feed&amp;utm_source=producthunt-atom-posts-feed">Discussion</a> | <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/r/p/1118756?app_id=339">Link</a> </p> Vidushee Geetam tag:www.producthunt.com,2005:Post/1117692 2026-04-07T03:45:57-07:00 2026-04-10T08:04:41-07:00 DMARKOFF <p> Simplified and total DMARC control </p> <p> <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/products/dmarkoff?utm_campaign=producthunt-atom-posts-feed&amp;utm_medium=rss-feed&amp;utm_source=producthunt-atom-posts-feed">Discussion</a> | <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/r/p/1117692?app_id=339">Link</a> </p> Aliaksandr Markau tag:www.producthunt.com,2005:Post/1119482 2026-04-08T23:36:09-07:00 2026-04-10T08:04:41-07:00 Orca <p> Your control center for parallel AI agents </p> <p> <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/products/orca-5?utm_campaign=producthunt-atom-posts-feed&amp;utm_medium=rss-feed&amp;utm_source=producthunt-atom-posts-feed">Discussion</a> | <a href="https://www.producthunt.com/r/p/1119482?app_id=339">Link</a> </p> Neil Parker
